---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to tools, client support, or usability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What agent, user, or integration problem would this solve?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the tool, client support, report, config, or documentation change you want.

## API Or Payment Impact

Does this require new API calls, paid scans, payment verification changes, or stored data?

## Validation Idea

How could we test that this improves behavior without relying on private data or live paid calls?
